---
title: "Memòria anual Salut Mental Perinatal Hospital del Mar"
author: ""
date: "Març 2026"
format: 
 revealjs:
  self-contained: false 
  theme: default
  transition: slide
  scrollable: true
  chalkboard: true
  include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
          .reveal h1, .reveal h2 {
            color: #ff5733 !important;
          }
          </style>
editor: visual
toc: TRUE
toc-expand: 1
toc-depth: 1
toc-title: "Contingut"
fixed: true
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <style>
      .tiny-table table {
      font-size: 0.4em;
      line-height: 0.9em
      }
    </style>
     <style>
      .small-table table {
      font-size: 0.6em;
      line-height: 1.2em
      }
    </style>
#| cache: false

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list=ls())
graphics.off()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
setwd('/home/dbergeba/docsdani/Perinatal/Memories/2025')
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
# This script is set to build anual memories and other data related to the perinatal psychiatry program


if (Sys.info()['nodename']=="dbergeba-HP-ProDesk-600-G1-TWRxx") {
  mainpath<-'/home/dbergeba/Documents/'
} else if (Sys.info()['nodename']=="dbergeba-OptiPlex-7020") {
  mainpath<-'/home/dbergeba/docsdani/'
} else {
  mainpath<-'/home/dbergeba/docsdani/'
}

mainpatho<-mainpath

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# Load the data
load("docs/Perinatal_data_allyJan2026.RData")
mainpath<-mainpatho
any=2025 # canviar aquí l'any de la memòria
data<-data[data$year<(any+1),]

# Aquest és el segon full de l'excel que passa la Lourdes, on estan les visites que sí han vingut, el full 3 seria les que no, i el 1 els totals per nhc.
anyp=2025

admdata<-readxl::read_excel(paste0("Perinatal ",anyp,".xlsx"), sheet=1)

# admdata$video<-ifelse(admdata$`Tipus visita`== 20 | admdata$`Tipus visita`== 21,1,0)
# admdata$telf<-ifelse(admdata$`Tipus visita`==50 | admdata$`Tipus visita`== 94,1,0)
# admdata$grup<-ifelse(admdata$`Tipus visita`==494,1,0)
# admdata$succpres<-ifelse(admdata$`Tipus visita`==10,1,0)
# admdata$prim<-ifelse(admdata$`Tipus visita`==494,1,0)
admdata$tipusvis<-ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 20,"Videoconsulta",
                         ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==50 | admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 94,"telefònnica",
                                ifelse(admdata$TIP.VISITA==494,"grupal",
                                       ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==10,"succ presen",
                                              ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==100 | admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 21,"primera",0)))))

admdata$video<-ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 20,1,0)
admdata$telf<-ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==50 | admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 94,1,0)
admdata$grup<-ifelse(admdata$TIP.VISITA==494,1,0)
admdata$succpres<-ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==10,1,0)
admdata$prim<-ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==100 | admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 21,1,0)

admdata$videoSi<-ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 20 & admdata$`VISTAT?`=="S",1,0)
admdata$telfSi<-ifelse((admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==50 | admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 94)  & admdata$`VISTAT?`=="S",1,0)
admdata$grupSi<-ifelse(admdata$TIP.VISITA==494 & admdata$`VISTAT?`=="S",1,0)
admdata$succpresSi<-ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==10 & admdata$`VISTAT?`=="S",1,0)
admdata$primSi<-ifelse((admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==100 | admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 21) & admdata$`VISTAT?`=="S",1,0)

admdata$videoAus<-ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 20 & admdata$`VISTAT?`=="N",1,0)
admdata$telfAus<-ifelse((admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==50 | admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 94)  & admdata$`VISTAT?`=="N",1,0)
admdata$grupAus<-ifelse(admdata$TIP.VISITA==494 & admdata$`VISTAT?`=="N",1,0)
admdata$succpresAus<-ifelse(admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==10 & admdata$`VISTAT?`=="N",1,0)
admdata$primAus<-ifelse((admdata$`TIP.VISITA`==100 | admdata$`TIP.VISITA`== 21) & admdata$`VISTAT?`=="N",1,0)

## De l'any anterior (2024)

admdata_old<-readxl::read_excel(paste0(mainpath,"Perinatal/Memories/",any-1,"/Perinatal ",any-1,".xlsx"), sheet=2)

admdata_old$video<-ifelse(admdata_old$`Tipus visita`== 20 ,1,0)
admdata_old$telf<-ifelse(admdata_old$`Tipus visita`==50 | admdata_old$`Tipus visita`== 94,1,0)
admdata_old$grup<-ifelse(admdata_old$`Tipus visita`==494,1,0)
admdata_old$succpres<-ifelse(admdata_old$`Tipus visita`==10,1,0)
admdata_old$prim<-ifelse(admdata_old$`Tipus visita`==100 | admdata_old$`Tipus visita`== 21,1,0)

admdata_old$tipusvis<-ifelse(admdata_old$`Tipus visita`== 20,"Videoconsulta",
                         ifelse(admdata_old$`Tipus visita`==50 | admdata_old$`Tipus visita`== 94,"telefònnica",
                                ifelse(admdata_old$`Tipus visita`==494,"grupal",
                                       ifelse(admdata_old$`Tipus visita`==10,"succ presen",
                                              ifelse(admdata_old$`Tipus visita`==100 | admdata_old$`Tipus visita`== 21,"primera",0)))))
```

# Repàs circuit i programa

## Breu presentació

La unitat de salut mental perinatal de l'Hospital del Mar:

-   Ofereix **Visites ambulatòries** en l'àmbit de: \
-- CCEE \
-- Grupals \
-- i recentment domiciliàries \

Àrea Litoral (Ciutat Vella, Sant Martí i La Mina)


```{mermaid}
%%| eval: false
graph LR
    %% Definición de los Doctores en un subgrafo para agruparlos
    subgraph Psiq_Perinatal
        A[Dr. Tal]
        B[Dr. Cual]
    end

    %% Definición de los equipos
    C[Coordinación con equipo T]
    D[Coordinación equipo B]

    %% Conexiones
   Psiq_Perinatal --> C
  Psiq_Perinatal --> D
    C-->D

    %% Estilos para que se vea profesional
    style A fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style B fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style C fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#01579b
    style D fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32
```

## Dispositius de la Xarxa {auto-animate="true" auto-animate-easing="ease-in-out"}

:::::: {#caja-doctores1 data-id="psiq" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 50px; position: absolute; top: 10%; left: 5%; box-shadow: 5 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background: LightBlue; padding: 10px;"}
::::: columns
::: {.column width="10%"}
<br> ![](Monigote50perc.jpg){width="25"} ![](Monigote70perc.jpg){width="25"} ![](Monigote10perc.jpg){width="25"}
:::

::: {.column width="90%"}
[**PSIQ PERINATAL**]{style="font-size: 1em; color: red;"} <br> [Dra. Malagon <br> Dr. Bergé <br> Psic T. Legido]{style="font-size: 0.8em;"}
:::
:::::
::::::

:::: {style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 500px; background-color: #f8f9fa;"}
::: {#aro-vacio style="width: 500px; height: 500px; border-radius: 50%; border: 15px solid LightBlue; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: transparent;"}
:::
::::

::: {#caja-doctores2 data-id="psic" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; position: absolute; top: 10%; left: 55%; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: AliceBlue; padding: 10px;"}
[**ASSIR-Psicologia**]{style="font-size: 1em; color: red;"} <br> [- S.García (Vila O)\
- M.de Gracia (CV i SMartí)\
- A. Segura (La Mina)]{style="font-size: 0.8em;"}
:::

::: {#caja-doctores3 data-id="assir" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; position: absolute; top: 55%; left: 15%; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: AliceBlue; padding: 10px;"}
[**ASSIR**]{style="font-size: 1em; color: red;"} <br> Llevadores
:::

::: {#caja-doctores4 data-id="hosp" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; position: absolute; top: 60%; left: 55%; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: AliceBlue; padding: 10px;"}
[**HOSPITAL**]{style="font-size: 1em; color: red;"} <br> [OBST\
**TS: C.Palès**]{style="font-size: 0.8em; "}
:::

::: {#caja-doctores5 data-id="csma" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; position: absolute; top: 75%; left: 0%; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: AliceBlue; padding: 10px;"}
[**CSMAs**]{style="font-size: 1em; color: gray;"} <br>
:::

::: {#caja-doctores6 data-id="com" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; position: absolute; top: 75%; left: 80%; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: AliceBlue; padding: 10px;"}
[**RECURSOS\
COMUNITARIS**]{style="font-size: 0.8em; color: red;"}
:::

## Circuit {auto-animate="true" auto-animate-easing="ease-in-out"}

::: {#caja-doctores1 data-id="psiq" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 50px; position: absolute; top: 70%; left: 40%; box-shadow: 5 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background: LightGreen; padding: 10px;"}
[**PSIQ PERINATAL**]{style="font-size: 1em; color: red;"} <br>
:::

::: {#caja-doctores2 data-id="psic" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; position: absolute; top: 30%; left: 40%; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: AliceBlue; padding: 10px;"}
[**ASSIR-Psicologia**]{style="font-size: 1em; color: red;"}
:::

::: {#caja-doctores3 data-id="assir" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; position: absolute; top: 1%; left: 40%; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: AliceBlue; padding: 10px;"}
[**ASSIR**]{style="font-size: 1em; color: red;"} <br> Llevadores
:::

::: {#caja-doctores4 data-id="hosp" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; position: absolute; top: 35%; left: 75%; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: AliceBlue; padding: 10px;"}
[**HOSPITAL**]{style="font-size: 1em; color: red;"} <br> [OBST\
**TS: C.Palès**]{style="font-size: 0.8em;"}
:::

::: {#caja-doctores5 data-id="csma" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; position: absolute; top: 35%; left: 0%; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: AliceBlue; padding: 10px;"}
[**CSMAs**]{style="font-size: 1em; color: gray;"} <br>
:::

::: {#caja-doctores6 data-id="com" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; position: absolute; top: 75%; left: 80%; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: AliceBlue; padding: 10px;"}
[**RECURSOS\
COMUNITARIS**]{style="font-size: 0.8em; color: red;"}
:::

<svg style="position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none;">

<line id="linea1" x1="550" y1="60" x2="550" y2="100" stroke="black" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" /> <defs> <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="0" refY="3.5" orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" /> </marker> </defs>

</svg>

<svg style="position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none;">

<line id="linea1" x1="550" y1="210" x2="550" y2="380" stroke="black" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" /> <defs> <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="0" refY="3.5" orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" /> </marker> </defs>

</svg>

::: {.fragment data-fragment-index="1" data-id="der" style="border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; position: absolute; top: 65%; left: 0%; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: AliceBlue; padding: 10px;"}
[Derivacions:\
- [psiperinatal\@hmar.cat](mailto:psiperinatal@hmar.cat)\
- Derivació ordinària\
- IS3]{style="font-size: 0.6em; color: gray;"}
:::

# Activitat en xifres

## Primeres visites programades

Programació: **`r tyear[tyear$Var1==any,"Freq"]` primeres visites (noves pacients)** en `r any`:\
- Un `r round(tyear[tyear$Var1==any,"Freq"]/tyear[tyear$Var1==(any-1),"Freq"] -1,2) *100`% d'increment relatiu en relació a l'any anterior.

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggplot(data=tyear[tyear$Var1!=(any+1),], aes(x=Var1, y=Freq)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", fill="steelblue")+
  geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("Primeres visites")+
  xlab("any")+
  ylim(0,160)+
  theme_minimal()
```

## Absències primeres visites


:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
Absència en **1ª instància**: `r (nrow(data[data$year==any,])-sum(data[data$year==any,"acutvisita_1aprogr"]))` pacients, ( `r round((nrow(data[data$year==any,])-sum(data[data$year==any,"acutvisita_1aprogr"]))/nrow(data[data$year==any,])*100,2)`% )
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
Absències **finals:** `r (nrow(data[data$year==any,])-sum(data[data$year==any,"acutvisita_any"]))` pacients, (`r round((nrow(data[data$year==any,])-sum(data[data$year==any,"acutvisita_any"]))/nrow(data[data$year==any,])*100,2)`%)
:::

::::
```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
require(gridExtra)
plot1<-ggplot(data=data, aes(fill=as.factor(acutvisita_1aprogr), x=as.factor(year))) +
  geom_bar(position="fill")+
  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("Acut a primera visita")+
  xlab("any")+
  scale_fill_discrete(name="Acut 1er intent 1a visita", labels=c("no","sí"))+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )+
  scale_x_discrete(labels=levels(as.factor(data$year)))+
  theme(legend.position="top")

plot2<-ggplot(data=data, aes(fill=as.factor(acutvisita_any), x=as.factor(year))) +
  geom_bar(position="fill")+
  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("Acut a primera visita")+
  xlab("any")+
  scale_fill_discrete(name="Acut algun intent de 1a visita", labels=c("no","sí"))+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )+
  scale_x_discrete(labels=levels(as.factor(data$year)))+
  theme(legend.position="top")
grid.arrange(plot1, plot2, ncol=2)

# plot2<-ggplot(data=data, aes(fill=as.factor(acutvisita_any), x=as.factor(year))) +
#   geom_bar(position="identity", alpha=0.6)+
#   #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
#   ylab("Acut a primera visita")+
#   xlab("any")+
#   scale_fill_discrete(name="Acut algun intent de 1a visita", labels=c("no","sí"))+
#   scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )+
#   scale_x_discrete(labels=levels(as.factor(data$year)))+
#   theme(legend.position="top")
# grid.arrange(plot1, plot2, ncol=2)

```

## Visites successives

[Programades: **`r sum(admdata$video+admdata$succpres+admdata$telf)` successives** ,   Efectuades: **`r sum(admdata$videoSi+admdata$succpresSi+admdata$telfSi)` successives**\
- `r sum(admdata$videoSi)` per videotrucada ( `r round(sum(admdata$videoSi)*100/sum(admdata$videoSi+admdata$succpresSi+admdata$telfSi),1)` %).   Ratio succ / 1a = `r round(sum(admdata$videoSi+admdata$succpresSi+admdata$telfSi)/sum(data[data$year==any,"acutvisita_any"]),3)`.]{style="font-size: 0.6em;"}

```{r echo=FALSE}
# succ <- data.frame(tipus_vis=c('pres', 'vll', 'tlf','prim','grup','tot'),
#                                                  num=c(699,211,263,129,189,1499))
# 
# onlysucc<-data.frame(tipus_vis=c('pres', 'vll', 'tlf','grup'),
#                                                  num=c(699,211,263,189))
# ggplot(onlysucc, aes(x=tipus_vis, y=num))+
#   geom_bar(stat="identity")+
#   ylab("Número")+
#   xlab("Tipus de visita successiva")+
#   scale_x_discrete(labels=c("grupals","presencials","Telf","Video"))
# 
# ggplot(onlysucc, aes(x=tipus_vis, y=num))+
#   geom_bar(stat="identity")+
#   ylab("Número")+
#   xlab("Tipus de visita successiva")+
#   scale_x_discrete(labels=c("grupals","presencials","Telf","Video"))

perce<- admdata %>%
  filter(tipusvis != "primera") %>%
  count(tipusvis, `VISTAT?` ) %>%
  group_by(tipusvis) %>%
    mutate(pct = n / sum(n) * 100, 
           etiqueta = paste0(round(pct, 1), "%" ))
  

perce_old<- admdata_old %>%
  filter(tipusvis != "primera") %>%
  count(tipusvis, `Visitat?` ) %>%
  group_by(tipusvis) %>%
    mutate(pct = n / sum(n) * 100, 
           etiqueta = paste0(round(pct, 1), "%" ))

plot3<-ggplot(data=perce, aes(fill=as.factor(`VISTAT?`), x=as.factor(tipusvis), y=n)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", alpha=0.9) +
  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("Número total")+
  xlab("tipus visita")+
  scale_fill_discrete(name="Acut a la visita", labels=c("no","sí"))+
  geom_text(aes(y=n,label= etiqueta), color="white", position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)) +
  #scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )+
  scale_x_discrete(labels=levels(as.factor(perce$tipusvis)))+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = NA)),
         color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linetype = 0))) +
  theme(legend.position="top")


#plot3+geom_point(data=perce[perce$`VISTAT?`=="S",], aes(fill=as.factor(`VISTAT?`), x=as.factor(tipusvis), stat="identity"))
plot3+geom_point(data=perce_old[perce_old$`Visitat?`=="S",], aes(y = n, fill=as.factor(`Visitat?`) )) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = 2.1, # Un poco a la derecha de la primera barra
           y = perce_old$n[3], 
           label = " = Presentandes en any anterior", 
           color = "black", fontface = "bold", hjust = 0) 

```

## Grups:

**4 edicions de grups terapèutics**\
`r nrow(unique(admdata[admdata$grup==1,"NHISTORIA"]))` pacients\
`r sum(admdata$grupSi)` visites grupals efectuades.

## Temps d'espera a 1a visita

Any `r any`, temps d'espera mitjà **`r round(mean(data$date_dif_1a_visprogr, na.rm=TRUE),2)`** dies (SD: `r round(sd(data$date_dif_1a_visprogr, na.rm=TRUE),2)`). Per anys anteriors:

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggplot(data=data, aes(y=date_dif_1a_visprogr,x=as.factor(year), fill=year==any)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA)+
  geom_jitter(alpha=0.2)+
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("gray","#69b3a2"))+
    theme(legend.position="none")+


  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("Dies d'espera")+
  xlab("any")+
  ylim(0,100)
 #   scale_fill_discrete(name="Acut 1a visita", labels=c("no","sí"))+
  #scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )

```

## Procedència de les derivacions

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}



p1<-ggplot(data=data[data$year==any,], aes(x=deriv_dd.factor)) +
  geom_bar(position="identity", fill="lightblue")+
  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("número")+
  xlab("Dispositiu")+
  coord_flip()+
  labs(caption="Els punts són dades de l'any anterior")
  

  
  p1+geom_point(data=data[data$year==(any-1),], aes(deriv_dd.factor), stat="count")

       #    coord_flip()+



```

## Motiu de les derivacions

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
p2<-ggplot(data=data[data$year==any,], aes(x=motiu.factor)) +
  geom_bar(position="identity", fill="lightblue")+
  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("número")+
  xlab("Dispositiu")+
  coord_flip()+
  labs(caption="Els punts són dades de l'any anterior")
 #   scale_fill_discrete(name="Acut 1a visita", labels=c("no","sí"))+
  #scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )
  p2+geom_point(data=data[data$year==(any-1),], aes(motiu.factor), stat="count")
```

# Característiques de les pacients:

## Estat obstètric inicial

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(scales)
ggplot(data=data[!is.na(data$est_obs_ini.factor),], aes(fill=est_obs_ini.factor, x=as.factor(year))) +
  geom_bar(position="fill")+
  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("%")+
  xlab("any")+
  scale_fill_discrete(name="Estat obstètric inicial")+ #, labels=c("no","sí"))+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )+
  scale_x_discrete(labels=levels(as.factor(data$year)))
```

## Setmanes de gestació a la derivació

De les emabarassades, la mitja en el moment de la derivació era de `r round(mean(data$gestdur_ini, na.rm=TRUE),2)` setmanes, (SD: `r round(sd(data$gestdur_ini, na.rm=TRUE),2)`).

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
means <- data %>%  
  group_by(year) %>%  
  dplyr::summarize(average = mean(gestdur_ini, by=year, na.rm=TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup() 

ggplot(data=data, aes(y=gestdur_ini,x=as.factor(year), fill=year==any)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA)+
  geom_jitter(alpha=0.2)+
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("gray","#69b3a2"))+
  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("Setmanes gestació")+
  xlab("any")+
  theme(legend.position="none")+

  geom_line(data = means, mapping = aes(x = as.factor(year), y = average, group=1),color="green")
    #scale_fill_discrete(name="Acut 1a visita", labels=c("no","sí"))+
  #scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )

```

## Setmanes postpart a la derivació

De les postpart, el promig de `r round(mean(data$postpart_ini, na.rm=TRUE),2)` setmanes, (SD: `r round(sd(data$postpart_ini, na.rm=TRUE),2)`)

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
means <- data %>%  
  group_by(year) %>%  
  dplyr::summarize(average = mean(postpart_ini, na.rm=TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup() 

ggplot(data=data, aes(y=postpart_ini,x=as.factor(year), fill=year==any)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA)+
  geom_jitter(alpha=0.2)+
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("gray","#69b3a2"))+
  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("Setmanes postpart")+
  xlab("any")+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  ylim(0,60)+
  geom_line(data = means, mapping = aes(x = as.factor(year), y = average, group=1),color="green")
    #scale_fill_discrete(name="Acut 1a visita", labels=c("no","sí"))+
  #scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )

```

## Edat

Promig de `r round(mean(data$edat_1avis, na.rm=TRUE),2)` anys, (SD: `r round(sd(data$edat_1avis, na.rm=TRUE),2)`)

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
means <- data %>%  
  group_by(year) %>%  
  dplyr::summarize(average = mean(edat_1avis, na.rm=TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup() 

ggplot(data=data, aes(y=edat_1avis,x=as.factor(year), fill=year==any)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA)+
  geom_jitter(alpha=0.2)+
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("gray","#69b3a2"))+
  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("Edat")+
  xlab("any")+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  #ylim(0,0)+
  geom_line(data = means, mapping = aes(x = as.factor(year), y = average, group=1),color="green")
    #scale_fill_discrete(name="Acut 1a visita", labels=c("no","sí"))+
  #scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )

```

## Ètnia

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
p2<-ggplot(data=data[data$year==any,], aes(x=ethnicity.factor)) +
  geom_bar(position="identity", fill="lightblue")+
  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("número")+
  xlab("Etnicitat")+
  coord_flip()+
  labs(caption="Els punts són dades de l'any anterior")
 #   scale_fill_discrete(name="Acut 1a visita", labels=c("no","sí"))+
  #scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )
  p2+geom_point(data=data[data$year==(any-1),], aes(ethnicity.factor), stat="count")
```

## Nivell educatiu

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
p2<-p2<-ggplot(data=data[data$year==any,], aes(x=niv_educ_part.factor)) +
  geom_bar(position="identity", fill="lightblue")+
  #geom_text(aes(label=Freq), vjust=-0.3, size=3.5)+
  ylab("número")+
  xlab("Nivell d'estudis")+
  coord_flip()+
  labs(caption="Els punts són dades de l'any anterior")
 #   scale_fill_discrete(name="Acut 1a visita", labels=c("no","sí"))+
  #scale_y_continuous(labels = percent )
p2+geom_point(data=data[data$year==(any-1),], aes(niv_educ_part.factor), stat="count")

```




## NPS

*"En una escala de 0 a 10,¿qué tan probable es que recomiende nuestros servicios sanitarios a un amigo o familiar?"*


```{r}
#| echo: false

datanps <- readRDS("NPS/2025/meves_dades_nps.rds")



#To calculate NPS

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Calculamos el NPS
# nps_resultado <- datanps %>%
#     mutate(categoria = case_when(
#     nps >= 9 ~ "Promotor",
#     nps <= 6 ~ "Detractor",
#     TRUE ~ "Pasivo"
#   )) %>%
#     group_by(categoria) %>%
#       dplyr::summarise(n = n()) %>%
#         mutate(porcentaje = n / sum(n) * 100)
nps_resultado <- datanps %>%
  # 1. Treure files sense nota per evitar que el percentatge surti buit
  filter(!is.na(nps)) %>% 
  
  # 2. Categoritzar
  mutate(categoria = case_when(
    nps >= 9 ~ "Promotor",
    nps <= 6 ~ "Detractor",
    TRUE ~ "Pasivo"
  )) %>%
  
  # 3. Agrupar i comptar
  group_by(categoria) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>% # .groups evita avisos de R
  
  # 4. Calcular percentatge (total sobre el que ha quedat)
  mutate(porcentaje = n / sum(n) * 100)

# Extraer el valor final
nps_score <- nps_resultado$porcentaje[nps_resultado$categoria == "Promotor"] - 
             nps_resultado$porcentaje[nps_resultado$categoria == "Detractor"]

print(paste("NPS Score =", round(nps_score, 2)))

ggplot(nps_resultado, aes(x = "", y = porcentaje, fill = categoria)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Detractor" = "#E74C3C", "Pasivo" = "#F1C40F", "Promotor" = "#2ECC71")) +
  labs(title = "Distribución de Categorías NPS", y = "Porcentaje", x = "") +
  theme_minimal()



```


# Objectius any anterior: 2025

## 1er objectiu: Disminuïr % No presentats en primeres visites

## Estratègies per reduir absències 2025

-   Fulletons per a difusió a ASSIR [Aquí](https://psmar-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/dberge_hmar_cat/IQD_NnYaA-LsQ7mzdQX4W8AjAar8i0kqW4ZRxUjV9lPQdks?e=MCd7ad)\
-   Reforç recordatori de la primera visita (Lourdes)\
-   Continuació mesures prèvies que eren:\
    Telf: cita directa ASSIR-programació Psiq

## Resultats reduir absències 2025

-   Absències primera instància  `r (nrow(data[data$year==any,])-sum(data[data$year==any,"acutvisita_1aprogr"]))` , ( `r round((nrow(data[data$year==any,])-sum(data[data$year==any,"acutvisita_1aprogr"]))/nrow(data[data$year==any,])*100,2)`% ).

-   Absències finals `r (nrow(data[data$year==any,])-sum(data[data$year==any,"acutvisita_any"]))` , (`r round((nrow(data[data$year==any,])-sum(data[data$year==any,"acutvisita_any"]))/nrow(data[data$year==any,])*100,2)`%)

-   En comparació amb l'any anterior:\
    Any **`r any-1`** : Absències en primera instància `r round((nrow(data[data$year==any-1,])-sum(data[data$year==any-1,"acutvisita_1aprogr"]))/nrow(data[data$year==any-1,])*100,2)`%,\
    Any **`r any-1`** : Absències finals `r round((nrow(data[data$year==any-1,])-sum(data[data$year==any-1,"acutvisita_any"]))/nrow(data[data$year==any-1,])*100,2)`%

-   **Reducció en % absoluts del `r round((nrow(data[data$year==any-1,])-sum(data[data$year==any-1,"acutvisita_any"]))/nrow(data[data$year==any-1,])*100,2) - round((nrow(data[data$year==any,])-sum(data[data$year==any,"acutvisita_any"]))/nrow(data[data$year==any,])*100,2)` %**\

-   **Reducció en % relatius del `r round((round((nrow(data[data$year==any-1,])-sum(data[data$year==any-1,"acutvisita_any"]))/nrow(data[data$year==any-1,])*100,2) - round((nrow(data[data$year==any,])-sum(data[data$year==any,"acutvisita_any"]))/nrow(data[data$year==any,])*100,2)) / round((nrow(data[data$year==any-1,])-sum(data[data$year==any-1,"acutvisita_any"]))/nrow(data[data$year==any-1,])*100,2)*100,2)`%**

## 2on Objectiu. Inici visites domiciliàries

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
## all scripts to load domi data
#the csv file comes from report "Domicilios", which include all data regarding domicilios
datad=read.csv(paste0(mainpath,"/Perinatal/outputs_redcap/PerinatalPsiquiatria-Domicilios_DATA_2026-01-21_1430.csv"))
#Setting Labels
library(Hmisc)
label(datad$record_id_pd)="Record ID"
label(datad$redcap_event_name)="Event Name"
label(datad$redcap_repeat_instrument)="Repeat Instrument"
label(datad$redcap_repeat_instance)="Repeat Instance"
label(datad$data_part_exp)="Dies desde data de part (autocalculat)"
label(datad$vis_conj___1)="Con qué acompañamiento se hace la visita? (choice=solo psiquiatra)"
label(datad$vis_conj___2)="Con qué acompañamiento se hace la visita? (choice=con llevadora)"
label(datad$vis_conj___3)="Con qué acompañamiento se hace la visita? (choice=con HAD)"
label(datad$vis_conj___4)="Con qué acompañamiento se hace la visita? (choice=con PSI)"
label(datad$vis_conj___5)="Con qué acompañamiento se hace la visita? (choice=con enfermero CSMA)"
label(datad$vis_conj___6)="Con qué acompañamiento se hace la visita? (choice=otros)"
label(datad$derivdomi)="Donde se deriva a  la paciente?"
label(datad$fechvisdomi)="Fecha visita"
#Setting Units


#Setting Factors(will create new variable for factors)
datad$redcap_event_name.factor = factor(datad$redcap_event_name,levels=c("socio_demo_arm_1","pregestant_arm_1","eval_gestant_18s_arm_1","eval_gestant_36s_arm_1","visites_domi_arm_1","eval_pospart_arm_1","socio_demo_arm_5","clinical_interrup_arm_5"))
datad$redcap_repeat_instrument.factor = factor(datad$redcap_repeat_instrument,levels=c("visita_domicilio"))
datad$vis_conj___1.factor = factor(datad$vis_conj___1,levels=c("0","1"))
datad$vis_conj___2.factor = factor(datad$vis_conj___2,levels=c("0","1"))
datad$vis_conj___3.factor = factor(datad$vis_conj___3,levels=c("0","1"))
datad$vis_conj___4.factor = factor(datad$vis_conj___4,levels=c("0","1"))
datad$vis_conj___5.factor = factor(datad$vis_conj___5,levels=c("0","1"))
datad$vis_conj___6.factor = factor(datad$vis_conj___6,levels=c("0","1"))
datad$derivdomi.factor = factor(datad$derivdomi,levels=c("1","2","3","4","5","6","7"))

levels(datad$redcap_event_name.factor)=c("socio_demo (Arm 1: gestació)","Pregestant (Arm 1: gestació)","eval_gestant_18s (Arm 1: gestació)","eval_gestant_36s (Arm 1: gestació)","Visites_domi (Arm 1: gestació)","eval_pospart (Arm 1: gestació)","socio_demo (Arm 5: interrupció)","clinical_interrup (Arm 5: interrupció)")
levels(datad$redcap_repeat_instrument.factor)=c("Visita_domicilio")
levels(datad$vis_conj___1.factor)=c("Unchecked","Checked")
levels(datad$vis_conj___2.factor)=c("Unchecked","Checked")
levels(datad$vis_conj___3.factor)=c("Unchecked","Checked")
levels(datad$vis_conj___4.factor)=c("Unchecked","Checked")
levels(datad$vis_conj___5.factor)=c("Unchecked","Checked")
levels(datad$vis_conj___6.factor)=c("Unchecked","Checked")
levels(datad$derivdomi.factor)=c("visita presencial Psiq perinatal","visita videollamada Psiq perinatal","visita CSMA","visita en el CAP","Hospital de Dia Madre Bebé","nueva visita domiciliaria","otros")
datad$year<-as.numeric(format(as.Date(datad$fechvisdomi), format="%Y"))
```

## Estratègies visites domiciliàries 2025

-   Circuit de visites domiciliares

<iframe src="V1_Domi_PsiqperinatalASSIR_24042025.pdf" width="1000px" height="500px">

</iframe>

## Resultats visites domiciliàries 2025

n= `r nrow(datad[datad$year==any,])` visites; `r length(unique(datad$record_id_pd))` pacients, `r mean(datad[!duplicated(datad$record_id_pd),"data_part_exp"])` dies postpart promig

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# formem la base de dades amb la suma de amb qui eren les visites
datadn<-data.frame(
  # acomp = les categories
  acomp=c(str_replace(str_split(label(datad$vis_conj___1),"=")[[1]][2],"\\)",""),
          str_replace(str_split(label(datad$vis_conj___2),"=")[[1]][2],"\\)",""),
          str_replace(str_split(label(datad$vis_conj___3),"=")[[1]][2],"\\)",""),
          str_replace(str_split(label(datad$vis_conj___4),"=")[[1]][2],"\\)",""),
          str_replace(str_split(label(datad$vis_conj___5),"=")[[1]][2],"\\)",""),
          str_replace(str_split(label(datad$vis_conj___6),"=")[[1]][2],"\\)","")),
  #ncont= els contatges
  ncont=c(sum(datad$vis_conj___1),sum(datad$vis_conj___2),sum(datad$vis_conj___3),sum(datad$vis_conj___4),sum(datad$vis_conj___5),sum(datad$vis_conj___6))
)
ggplot(datadn, aes(x = acomp, y=ncont, fill=acomp))+
  geom_col()+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  labs(title="Acompanyant durant les visites domiciliàries", x="Acompanyant", y="Número visites", fill="")
```

## 3er Objectiu. Estructurar coordinació amb EAIAs

Degut als canvis soferts a la DGAIA, actualment DGPPIA, no ha estat possible establir un circuit estable de reunions amb els serveis i dispositius afins.

## 4rt Objectiu: Incrementar coordinació amb comunitària

-   Presentació a CAP Ramón Turró
-   Presentació a COPED (Pediatria)
